plan-phase: Create PLAN.md with task breakdown, dependencies, and verification steps for a numbered roadmap phase
execute-phase: Run all PLAN.md files for a numbered phase using wave-based parallel subagents and atomic commits
quick: Run a small ad-hoc task outside the roadmap with atomic commits but no planning ceremony
progress: Show project status, summarize completed and upcoming phases, and route to the next action
new-project: Initialize a brand-new project from scratch with context gathering, PROJECT.md, and first roadmap
discuss-phase: Ask the user targeted questions to gather decisions and context before planning a phase
research-phase: Investigate APIs, libraries, and technical patterns for a phase and produce RESEARCH.md
add-phase: Append a new phase to the end of the current milestone roadmap
insert-phase: Insert urgent work as a decimal phase (e.g., 2.5) between existing roadmap phases
remove-phase: Delete a future phase from the roadmap and renumber subsequent phases
list-phase-assumptions: Surface Claude's implicit assumptions about a phase approach so the user can correct them before planning
new-milestone: Start a new development cycle within an existing project — define goals, requirements, and roadmap
complete-milestone: Finalize and archive a finished milestone with git tag and prepare for the next version
audit-milestone: Check whether a milestone met all its original requirements and flag gaps before archiving
plan-milestone-gaps: Generate fix phases for every gap found by the milestone audit report
health: Diagnose .planning/ directory integrity — detect missing files, broken refs, and optionally repair them
verify-work: Walk through built features with the user in a conversational UAT testing session
map-codebase: Scan the entire repo with parallel agents to produce structured codebase analysis documents
debug: Investigate a bug using systematic debugging with persistent state across context resets
add-tests: Generate unit and integration tests for a completed phase based on its UAT criteria
pause-work: Save a context snapshot and handoff notes so work can resume in a future session
resume-work: Restore full context from a previous session's handoff notes and continue where you left off
check-todos: List pending todo items and let the user pick one to work on next
add-todo: Capture a quick idea or task as a structured todo item for later — not a roadmap phase
settings: Open the full GSD configuration panel to toggle workflow options and set model profile
set-profile: Switch the model profile for GSD subagents between quality, balanced, or budget tiers
update: Update GSD to the latest version and display the changelog
reapply-patches: Restore local customizations that were overwritten by a GSD update
help: Show all available GSD commands with descriptions and usage examples
join-discord: Get the invite link to join the GSD Discord community
cleanup: Archive old phase directories from already-completed milestones to reduce .planning/ clutter
validate-phase: Retroactively audit a completed phase for Nyquist validation gaps and generate missing coverage
